content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_DIVISION_PERFORMANCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_DIVISION_PERFORMANCE]
( 
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DispositionID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LastCallResultID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[SetBy_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ZipCode] [nvarchar](7)  NULL,
	[EntryDate] [date]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[EntryMonth] [date]  NULL,
	[LastCallTimeOfDay] [nvarchar](9)  NULL,
	[LeadDateEnteredTimeOfDay] [nvarchar](9)  NULL,
	[LeadCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ProspectCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [int]  NULL,
	[ApptEverSet] [int]  NULL,
	[Verified] [int]  NULL,
	[EverVerified] [int]  NULL,
	[Confirmed] [int]  NULL,
	[EverConfirmed] [int]  NULL,
	[Issued] [int]  NULL,
	[EverIssued] [int]  NULL,
	[NetIssued] [int]  NULL,
	[EverNetIssued] [int]  NULL,
	[Sat] [int]  NULL,
	[EverSat] [int]  NULL,
	[Sold] [int]  NULL,
	[NetSold] [int]  NULL,
	[NetSalesAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[GrossSalesAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[JobCount] [int]  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [EntryDate] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
